diagrams.title: Unadjusted Function Point (UFP) Formula
diagrams.description: UFP = (ILF x 7) + (EIF x 5) + (EI x 3) + (EO x 4) + (EQ x 3)
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the calculation of Unadjusted Function Point
